content.en:
It didn't take long for Ye Tian and Mo Chen to come to that special treasure land.

After all, after Mo Chen was seriously injured at the beginning, he fled in a hurry, and naturally he couldn't escape far, so his sleeping Bai Gu Yuan was very close to this treasure land.

"This is it!"

Mo Chen pointed to an area not far away and said.

Ye Tian sensed this treasure land, this treasure land turned out to be in the lair of a group of creatures at the end of the world.

No, it should be said that this group of creatures lives around this treasure land.

Mo Chen introduced: "This group of creatures at the end of the world is the hundred-legged crocodile dragon clan, there are a lot of people in this clan, but there are very few strong ones, there are only a few hundred-legged crocodile dragons here that are comparable to the half-step perfect controller!"

"Not a powerful race, indeed!"

Ye Tian said lightly.

Of course, for the Origin Realm Sea, the hundred-legged crocodile dragon here is extremely terrifying.

Maybe the original Ten Elements Ancestor and Primordial Ancestor also came here, but after perceiving the hundred-legged crocodile here, they included this place in the forbidden land, and they didn't dare to go deeper.

"Don't worry about these hundred-legged crocodiles, with them, they can protect this place for us!"

Mo Chen said with a smile.

Immediately, Ye Tian and Mo Chen erupted with some breath, making these hundred-legged crocodile dragons tremble, and they didn't dare to attack Ye Tian and them.

After all, Ye Tian's strength far surpassed these hundred-legged crocodiles, and these hundred-legged crocodiles were not stupid, so they naturally did not dare to attack Ye Tian and them.

In an instant, Ye Tian and Mo Chen passed through the territory of these hundred-legged crocodile dragons and entered this treasure land.

"This treasure land, I call it the Nine Rivers Void. Mo Chen said: "There are a total of nine layers of void in the Nine Rivers Void, each layer of the void is a long river that surrounds endless time and space, and the resources of the first three layers of the void are average, for us, it is not very dangerous, but it is more dangerous for the hundred-legged crocodile." And every layer of the void is occupied by an overlord or a powerful race, and any creature that enters here will be attacked by them. "

"We don't need to stay in the first three layers of the void, go directly through the three layers of the void, enter the fourth layer of the void, the fourth layer of the void to the sixth layer of the void have a lot of resources, and even help you and me, but the real danger is the seventh layer of the void, the long river of the seventh layer of the void is called the long river of corrosion, the river water there can even corrode the body of the peak half-step perfect controller, although we can resist the power of the corrupted long river, but the strength will be affected somewhat, and the most dangerous thing in the seventh layer of the void is the lord of corrosion, the lord of corruption is an incomparably terrifying creature, and can incarnate countless incarnations, even if he kills his incarnation, the power of the incarnation can be superimposed on other incarnations, which will make the avatar stronger and stronger. In the beginning, I was severely injured by the Lord of Corrosion. "

"In addition, I sensed the breath of the Extreme Creation Substance on the seventh layer, but at the beginning of the battle, I didn't carefully probe the situation of the Extreme Creation Substance, but there was indeed a Extreme Creation Substance there. "

Mochen reassured.

"Okay, then let's first find some resources from the fourth layer of the void to the sixth layer of the void, and then go to the seventh layer of the void first. Ye Tian nodded.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian and Mo Chen entered the fourth layer of the Nine Rivers Void.

Here, they encountered a race, the Ten Thousand Scale Fish, the strength of this race is very strong, much stronger than the hundred-legged crocodile, but for Ye Tian and them, it is still very weak.

After Ye Tian and the others killed a batch of 10,000-scale fish, these 10,000-scale fish hid and did not dare to attack Ye Tian and them again.

Then, Ye Tian and Mo Chen searched for resources in this layer of void, spent some years, and collected a lot of resources that would help them cultivate.

Not long after, Ye Tian and Mo Chen came to the fifth layer of the Nine Rivers Void.

Here, there is a powerful overlord-level creature - the Lord of the Blood Huang, whose main body is a Blood Huang and calls himself the Lord of the Blood Huang.

The strength of this Blood Glory Lord is comparable to that of a half-step perfect controller at the peak, and it is far from being the opponent of Ye Tian and Mo Chen.

However, the Lord of Blood Huang has a special ability, that is, it is very difficult to kill, it can use the power of the fifth layer of the void to continuously recover itself, even if the perfect controller wants to kill the Lord of Blood Huang, it will take some effort.

When Ye Tian came to the fifth layer of the void, he sensed it with the copying talent and probed the talent of the Lord of Blood Huang.

Perfect Grade Ancestral Fu: Blood River Immortal

"Another perfect-level ancestral endowment, good luck!"

Ye Tian immediately copied the Perfect-level Ancestral Fu of the Lord of Blood Huang.

"It's you!"

The Lord of Blood Huang recognized Mo Chen, and immediately panicked, and immediately fled in fright.

After all, its strength is far inferior to Mochen, so naturally it will not look for death and fight Mochen.

Mo Chen didn't bother to kill him, and collected the resources here with Ye Tian.

But.

Ye Tian secretly fused the Blood River Immortal Sect, a perfect-level ancestral endowment.

After the fusion, I knew the effect of this perfect-level ancestral endowment, that is, in some special rivers, you can absorb the power of the river to ensure that you can quickly recover from your injuries and absorb energy, so as to have a near-indestructible effect.

It was precisely because of this that the Lord of Blood could quickly recover from his injuries, and the Perfection-level Controller could not kill it with a single blow.

Of course.

It is also because of the special environment of the Nine Rivers Void, if it is in the end of the realm, the Blood River Immortal cannot block the blow of the perfection-level controller, and the Lord of the Blood Huang will definitely die.

It didn't take long for Ye Tian to completely fuse the Blood River Immortal Sect, a perfect-level ancestral endowment.

"There are more and more perfection ancestors of many life-saving or immortal types, and my life-saving ability will become more and more exaggerated in the future, even if it is a perfect controller who is stronger than me, it will be difficult to kill me!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

After a period of time, Ye Tian and Mo Chen had almost scraped the resources of the fifth layer of the void.

After that, they came to the sixth level of the Void.

This layer of the void is occupied by a race, this race is the Void Eye Clan, this race is good at annihilating the will of the enemy, but it is no threat to Ye Tian and Mo Chen.

After killing some of the Void Eye Clan, Ye Tian and Mo Chen began to collect the resources here, and it took some more time.

Finally, on this day, they were ready to enter the seventh layer of the Nine Rivers Void, which was also an extremely dangerous layer.

Mo Chen said that he was in danger on the seventh layer, and was severely injured by the Lord of Corrosion on the seventh layer.

Although Ye Tian didn't know whether what Mo Chen said was true or false, the danger of the seventh layer was certain, and the seventh layer was very likely to have an extremely powerful substance, which was also what Ye Tian was extremely looking forward to.

Airplanes!

Ye Tian and Mo Chen immediately entered the seventh layer of the void and came to a long river of corrosion.

Suddenly, the corrosive power poured in, and no matter how they dodged, this corrosive power could spread to many planes and planes, affecting their bodies.

"Sure enough, it's an incomparably terrifying corrosive force!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Just then, a voice came.

"Mochen, you are looking for death, and you are here again!"

The Lord of Corruption has descended.

I saw that there were dense incarnations of the Lord of Corrosion all around, each of which had the strength of a half-step perfect controller that almost surpassed the peak, and each incarnation contained terrifying corrosive power, in an environment like the Long River of Corrosion, the combat power of the Lord of Corrosion skyrocketed.

"Be careful, it's hard for us to kill the Lord of Corrosion, the main thing is to fight or hurt the Lord of Corrosion, negotiate with him and get him not to attack us. Mochen suggested.

"Good!"

Ye Tian nodded.
